brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Use active voice. Avoid jargon and superlatives. The first line must be concise and direct, setting the tone for the rest of the sentence.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. With Searchable, brands can monitor their brand mentions and rankings, optimize their content for AI search, and identify areas for improvement to increase their online visibility and drive growth.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when your brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure your content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search

pain_points: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search performance metrics
messaging_angles: Improve your brand's online visibility and drive growth through AI search optimization
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: SaaS engagement benchmarks for the selected format.
content_brief.reasoning: With 6 distinct features and 3 pain points, a carousel is the best content type to showcase the product's capabilities and address the target audience's concerns. The minimal brand tone and presence of a strong stat also support this choice, as carousels can effectively present educational content and highlight key statistics. The proof point count of 2 provides additional credibility to the content, further justifying the use of a carousel. Since the brand tone is minimal, a text post may not be the best fit, and the lack of a customer name means a single image post may not be the most effective choice either.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines daily
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable drives growth through AI search optimization
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO platforms that focus on traditional search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by identifying the gaps in your current AI search strategy
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Improve your brand's online visibility and drive growth through AI search optimization

linkedin_content.hook: Start by identifying the gaps in your current AI search strategy
linkedin_content.body:
You're checking multiple AI engines every day to track your brand mentions and rankings. 
This process takes hours and leaves you wondering if you're getting the full picture. 
You're looking for a way to simplify this task and focus on growing your brand.

Your current AI search strategy has gaps that make it hard to track your brand's online presence. 
These gaps lead to missed opportunities and a lack of insight into your competitors' strategies. 
This lack of insight makes it difficult to adjust your strategy and stay ahead.

Every hour you spend manually tracking AI search metrics is an hour you're not spending on growth. 
This manual tracking process is time-consuming and prone to errors, which can lead to poor decision-making. 
The cost of these errors can be significant, affecting your brand's reputation and bottom line.

Searchable drives growth through AI search optimization, helping you fill the gaps in your current strategy. 
With Searchable, you can track your brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines in one place. 
This streamlined process saves you time and provides valuable insights to inform your growth strategy.

Companies that use Searchable have seen significant improvements in their share of voice, with a 206% increase. 
This improvement is a direct result of Searchable's AI search optimization capabilities, which help you outperform your competitors. 
By optimizing your AI search strategy with Searchable, you can achieve similar results and drive growth for your brand.

Searchable's AI search optimization capabilities are designed to help you achieve your growth goals. 
With Searchable, you can focus on developing a winning strategy, rather than spending hours tracking metrics. 
By simplifying your AI search tracking process, Searchable gives you the freedom to focus on what matters most - growing your brand.

Starting a trial with Searchable is the first step towards driving growth through AI search optimization. 
With a trial, you can experience the benefits of Searchable's streamlined AI search tracking process for yourself. 
By signing up for a trial, you'll be one step closer to achieving your growth goals and outperforming your competitors.

Sign up for a trial with Searchable today and start driving growth through AI search optimization. 
The trial is a risk-free way to experience the benefits of Searchable's AI search optimization capabilities. 
By starting your trial now, you'll be taking the first step towards simplifying your AI search strategy and achieving your growth goals.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is well-structured and easy to follow, with each sentence conveying a single idea, but some sentences are a bit long and could be broken up for better flow. The hook is direct and sets the tone for the rest of the copy, but it doesn't create a strong sense of urgency or curiosity, and the reader may not be immediately invested in the problem being solved. The copy uses active voice, avoids jargon and superlatives, and each sentence conveys a single idea, perfectly matching the writing instruction. The copy accurately reflects the primary claim and uses the proof point (206% share of voice improvements) to support the claim, without inventing any statistics or facts.
